The question is asking to compare the parking spaces between Sepulveda and Van Nuys stations. Since each row represents a station and the "parking" column indicates the number of parking spaces, we need to compare the values in the "parking" column for each station. We can use the f_group_column(parking) operation to group the parking spaces by station to analyze this situation.
Sepulveda has 1,205 parking spaces, while Van Nuys has 776 parking spaces. Comparing these two numbers, Sepulveda has the larger number of parking spaces.
